data.body: B5 cutover note: the workflow plan-review path must preserve the bespoke gate error semantics — a systemic LLMUnavailableError currently propagates out of the batch runner (run_pass1 re-raises), whereas the bespoke run_review degrades to an unsigned INDETERMINATE verdict (orchestrator.py ~209-217). Before cutting the claim gate over to the workflow, ensure the workflow path produces the same INDETERMINATE-on-outage (fail-closed but unsigned) behavior, so claim-gate availability semantics are unchanged.
